reviews.review_description: I am a paying subscriber and yet nothing shows in my vault on this quest app. Says the vault is empty. Completely useless. And what little I could find online suggests it’s been broken with zero updates for some time.

Not having a LastPass app has been a near deal breaker in VR for me. So happy that LastPass has decided to support VR. The app currently (November 2022) is pretty basic but does what’s needed. I’d love to see a collaboration between LastPass and Meta to get some tighter integration like what’s expected with desktop and mobile phone OSs. 5 stars because it works and I’m just thrilled it’s finally here.
